metadata.description: CODA-bundled Claude Code plugins — ship with every CODA deployment

plugins.name: coda-essentials
plugins.description: Subagents, hooks, slash commands, and session lifecycle tooling bundled with every CODA instance. Includes the TDD subagent workflow (prd-writer, test-generator, implementer, build-feature), session-start git context loader, memory staleness checker, crystallization nudge, and the /til slash command.
